events.title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake quake strikes off Mexico coast

events.title: Iran nuclear and military damage revealed after restricted satellite images released

events.title: Uganda suspends school trips after 20 pupils die in bus crash
events.summary: Thousands are killed on Uganda's roads each year but this is one of its deadliest accidents involving children.

events.title: Second tanker in three months hijacked off Yemen by suspected Somali pirates
events.summary: There have also been several unsuccessful attacks in a region where piracy appears to be making a comeback.

events.title: Bodycam footage shows airlift of girl stranded by Texas floods
events.summary: Footage shows a rescuer reaching a family of three stranded by floods that destroyed their house in Uvalde county.

events.title: At least two dead in Texas floods ravaging same area where campers died
events.summary: The same area devastated by floods last year's floods, which caused more than 130 deaths, is once again being hit.

events.title: Watch: Torrential rain hits New York and New Jersey triggering flash floods
events.summary: Water cascaded into subway stations and flooded streets, with people seen wading through water.

events.title: Flash flood kills 4, leaves 4 others missing in Vietnam

events.title: British couple return to village at heart of deadly Spanish wildfire

events.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43

events.title: Norway opens new memorial for victims of 2011 massacre

events.title: Bowen: For all his bluster, Trump has no better option than talks with Iran

events.summary: The Iran-backed Houthis blame Saudi Arabia for the attack in Yemen's capital and say they targeted Abha airport in response.

events.title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say

events.summary: There have also been several unsuccessful attacks in a region where piracy appears to be making a comeback.

events.title: Orange haze from Canada wildfires seen in Ontario and northern US

events.summary: Canadian officials say that fire activity in Ontario is beginning to ease, with air quality expected to improve in US cities too.

events.title: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US

events.title: Zelensky's removal of popular defence minister sparks protests in Ukraine
